title: Soartex Forever
body:
The go-to smooth & clean 64x resource pack.

!["Soartex Banner" by Shoeboxam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d483ce4d6c3a9cfb4b7ab255fefeb758c4d55a8e.jpeg)
📜 Soartex Forever ![Scroll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3c22c90e9f64220fc909f08dd958fa3d08a720a_0.webp)
![Notice "required"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16b4cd8989cecf9f8e31647795be4a3cd38c77b5.png)
⚙️ Required Mods The mods "[OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)" or [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), and [ESF](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf) by Traben are all **REQUIRED** as this pack contains features that require them to work properly.
![Addons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c521f507232faf2a706ea93a8a987811b48960fa.png)
🧩 Addons **Fresh Animations** [Addon Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/soartex-forever-fresh-animations)!
![Additional Information](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a22b56a9a923a3473ac50e438e1781d12d01fe4.png)
If you have any feedback, **want to report a bug**, or generally need help, **join our** [Discord](https://discord.gg/8hw9qzuqnN) **server**! Additional credits to AVPSoftworks for his contribuitions!
